context: The bald eagle is kind. The bald eagle likes the tiger. The bear is red. The bear is rough. The bear likes the tiger. The tiger is not green. The tiger needs the bear. If someone needs the bald eagle and the bald eagle needs the bear then they are green. Kind people are red. Nice, rough people are kind. If someone needs the tiger and they do not visit the tiger then the tiger is not nice. If the bear visits the bald eagle then the bald eagle needs the bear. If someone needs the bear and they are not nice then they visit the bear. If someone needs the bear then they visit the bear. If someone needs the bald eagle and the bald eagle does not visit the bear then the bald eagle is green.
label: True
formalisations:
PREDICATES:

tiger(x) ::: x is a tiger
bear(x) ::: x is a bear

likes(x, y) ::: x likes y
red(x) ::: x is red
rough(x) ::: x is rough
needs(x, y) ::: x needs y
green(x) ::: x is green
nice(x) ::: x is nice
visits(x, y) ::: x visits y

PREMISES:

forall x (bald_eagle(x) -> likes(x, tiger))
forall x (bear(x) -> red(x))
forall x (bear(x) -> rough(x))
forall x (bear(x) -> likes(x, tiger))
forall x (tiger(x) -> NOT green(x))
green(x) <-> needs(x, tiger) & NOT visits(x, tiger)
red(x) <-> kind(x)
nice(x) & rough(x) -> kind(x)
needs(x, tiger) & NOT visits(x, tiger) -> NOT nice(tiger)
visits(x, bald_eagle) -> needs(x, bear)
needs(x, bear) & NOT nice(x) -> visits(x, bear)
needs(x, bear) -> visits(x, bear)
needs(x, bald_eagle) & NOT visits(bear) -> green(bald_eagle)

CONCLUSION:
rough(bear)

context: The bald eagle is green. The bear chases the bald eagle. The cow likes the bear. The squirrel chases the bear. Round, rough things are green. If something chases the bear then it likes the squirrel. If something is red and rough then it likes the bear. If the bear likes the bald eagle and the bald eagle likes the cow then the bald eagle is blue. If something chases the cow and it eats the bald eagle then the bald eagle eats the cow. If something likes the cow and it is blue then it chases the bear.
conclusion: The bear chases the bald eagle.
